title: Implement link layer frame format
description: Per spec section 4: Length(1B) + LLSec(1B) + SeqNum(2B) + DstAddr(2-8B) + Payload + MIC(4-8B). Implement encoding/decoding in both Rust and C. Create test vectors.
close_reason: Link layer frame format implemented in python/src/lichen/link/frame.py (LichenFrame to_bytes/from_bytes, AddrMode/MicLength, LLSec byte) with tests/link/test_frame.py. Cross-language vectors in test/vectors/link_frame.json.
